title: While Loop Countdown
description: Create a countdown from 3 to 1 using a while loop.
problemStatement:
Use a `while` loop to count down from `3` to `1`. Print each number, followed by `"Go!"` outside the loop.

**Expected Output:** 
`3` 
`2` 
`1` 
`Go!`
hints: Don't forget to decrease your counter (like `i--`) so the loop doesn't run forever!
